results.rendered_html:
kaśipu m.n. Matte, Kissen: yathā naḍaṃ kaśipune striyo bhindantyaśmanā  AV. 6,138,5 . hiraṇmayaṃ kaśipūpastṛṇāti, kaśipunoḥ  ŚAT. BR. 13,4,3,1 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 45,6,4 . 20,2,21 . paścādagnerdarbheṣu kaśipvāstīrya  KAUŚ. 24 . satyāṃ kṣitau kiṃ kaśipoḥ prayāsaiḥ  BHĀG. P. 2,2,4 . kḷptaiḥ kaśipubhiḥ kāntaṃ paryaṅkavyajanāsanaiḥ 3,23,16 . (śaye) kvacitprāsādaparyaṅke kaśipau vā 7,13,40 . Nach den Lexicogrr.: m. Kost und Kleidung  AK. 3,4,19,133 .  H. an. 3,441 .  MED. p. 18 . kasipu  H. 685 .  JAṬĀDH. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. hiraṇyakaśipu.
